description_long: This object is a weathered, upright stone monument with a rectangular body and a rounded top, resembling a traditional gravestone or memorial obelisk. The front face features an inscription that is partially eroded, with faint, shallowly engraved text visible in the upper and central portions. The sides are flat and relatively thin, while the back is plain and rough, lacking any visible markings or ornamentation. The base is slightly irregular, with some remnants of ground material clinging to the lower edge, suggesting it was partially embedded in soil. The surface texture is rough and matte, with signs of age and exposure to the elements, giving it a pale, almost chalky appearance.
description: A weathered, upright stone monument with a rounded top and faint front inscription, rough and unadorned on the sides and back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main inscription area with faint, shallowly engraved text and a rounded top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin, flat profile and the depth of the stone, with some ground material at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, rough surface with no visible markings or ornamentation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the thinness and rough texture of the stone.
attribute_inscription: Faint, shallowly engraved text on the front face, partially eroded and difficult to read; style is simple and utilitarian, language appears to be English, legibility is low.
attribute_base_design: The base is slightly irregular and merges with the ground, with no distinct platform or decorative features; appears to be a simple extension of the stone slab.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is rounded and smoothly transitions from the rectangular body, with no unique features or decorations.
